creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: lbartoletti
Date: Mon Sep 14 19:22:03 UTC 2020
New revision: 548675
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/548675

Log:
  x11-toolkits/vte3: revert update to 0.60.3

  vte3 requires fribidi>=1.0.0 I forgot to push it with the update of vte3.

  BTW, an exp-run for fribidi has been requested (PR #228876). In the meantime, I revert my commit.

  PR:	249319
  Reported by:	VVD

Changes:
  head/x11-toolkits/vte3/Makefile
  head/x11-toolkits/vte3/distinfo
  head/x11-toolkits/vte3/pkg-plist
